Classify Olsen phosphorus availability

Source: R/soil_P_availability.R
classify_P_olsen.Rd

Classifies soil phosphorus availability using the Olsen method, following DPI Emilia-Romagna 2026 (Fert_Office v1.26 foglio Gri_P). The input may be expressed either as elemental P or as P2O5 equivalent; the conversion factor is P2O5 = P / 0.436681.

Usage

classify_P_olsen(
  value,
  unit = c("P", "P2O5"),
  p_availability.table = nfert_data_get("p_availability.table"),
  p_availability_meta = nfert_data_get("p_availability_meta")
)

Arguments

value

Numeric. Olsen phosphorus value in ppm.

unit

Either "P" or "P2O5" (default "P").

p_availability.table

Lookup table, default NFert::p_availability.table.

p_availability_meta

Conversion metadata, default NFert::p_availability_meta.

Value

A list with:

  • value_ppm_P, value_ppm_P2O5: input converted to both units.

  • ID_Gri_P: class id (1 molto bassa ... 5 molto elevata).

  • rating: human-readable class.

  • soil_class: DPI "Classe dotaz." (molto scarso, scarso, normale, molto alto).

  • strategy: one of "Arricchimento", "Mantenimento", "Riduzione".

Examples

classify_P_olsen(value = 15, unit = "P2O5")
#> $value_ppm_P
#> [1] 6.550215
#> 
#> $value_ppm_P2O5
#> [1] 15
#> 
#> $ID_Gri_P
#> [1] 2
#> 
#> $rating
#> [1] "low"
#> 
#> $soil_class
#> [1] "scarso"
#> 
#> $strategy
#> [1] "Arricchimento"
#> 
classify_P_olsen(value = 6.55, unit = "P")
#> $value_ppm_P
#> [1] 6.55
#> 
#> $value_ppm_P2O5
#> [1] 14.99951
#> 
#> $ID_Gri_P
#> [1] 2
#> 
#> $rating
#> [1] "low"
#> 
#> $soil_class
#> [1] "scarso"
#> 
#> $strategy
#> [1] "Arricchimento"
#>

On this page
